description: You are a logistics planner visualizing service regions for London airports. Create a Voronoi Diagram representing the catchment areas for the six major London airports based on their coordinates relative to Central London (0,0): Heathrow (-26, 3), Gatwick (-2, -42), Stansted (50, 52), Luton (-36, 53), London City (11, 3), and Southend (63, 6). The diagram must be generated from a list of these points and include a text label 'Service Areas'. Save the project to ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/london_airports_voronoi.ggb
